data.question: Please give me the number of all clowns.
Please give me the birth place of all employees.
Please give me the fax number of all employees.
Please give me the addresses of employee Andreas Rivera.
data.sql_query_ref: select street, city from employees join profile on employees_id=employees.Id join contact on profile_id=profile.id join address on contact_id=contact.Id where employees.name='Andreas Rivera'

data.question: Please give me all project eyes.
What is the smile of all projects.
Which employee has the project Incubate World-Class Schema.
data.sql_query_ref: select employees.name from employees join profile on employees_id=employees.Id join projects on profile_id=profile.id where projects.name='Incubate World-Class Schema'

data.question: Please give me the tasks descriptions of employee Jim Jarmusch
data.js_query_ref: var all_tasks=[];var result=data.employees.filter(employee => employee.name=='Jim Jarmusch').map(employee => {employee.profile.projects.map(project=>{project.tasks.map(task=>{all_tasks.push(task.description)})})}); result=all_tasks;
data.sql_query_ref: select tasks.description from employees join profile on employees_id=employees.Id join projects on profile_id=profile.id join tasks on projects_id=projects.id where employees.name='Jim Jarmusch'

data.question: Which employee has Ente as primary skill in their project?
data.sql_query_ref: select employees.name from employees join profile on employees_id=employees.Id join projects on profile_id=profile.id join tasks on projects_id=projects.id join assignedTo on tasks_id=tasks.id join skills on assignedTo_id=assignedTo.id where skills."primary"='Ente'

data.question: Which employees have Healthcare as tool in their project?
Which employees have Walter or SAP as domain experience in their project?
data.sql_query_ref: select distinct employees.name from employees join profile on employees_id=employees.Id join projects on profile_id=profile.id join tasks on projects_id=projects.id join assignedTo on tasks_id=tasks.id join skills on assignedTo_id=assignedTo.id join experience on skills_id = skills.Id join domains on experience_id = experience.id  where domains.value in ('Walter','SAP')

data.question: Which employees have Healthcare and E-commerce as chairs in their project?
Which employees has a certificate updated before 1965-08-01
data.sql_query_ref: select distinct employees.name from employees join profile on employees_id=employees.Id join projects on profile_id=profile.id join tasks on projects_id=projects.id join assignedTo on tasks_id=tasks.id join skills on assignedTo_id=assignedTo.id join experience on skills_id = skills.Id  join certifications on experience_id=experience.id join meta on certifications_id=certifications.id where lastUpdated<'1965-08-01'

data.question: Which employees have no experience?
data.sql_query_ref: select employees.name from employees join profile on employees_id=employees.Id join projects on profile_id=profile.id join tasks on projects_id=projects.id join assignedTo on tasks_id=tasks.id join skills on assignedTo_id=assignedTo.id join experience on skills_id = skills.Id where experience.years=0

data.question: Which employees live north of 1000°?
In wich different fun parks employees lives?

Wich animals have the same timezone?
(use name only to identify animal)
What is the not existing domain experience?
Please give me the number of skills per user?
Please give me the employees ids and names having a skill in 'marmelade' and experience in DevOps.
data.sql_query_ref: select employees.id, employees.name from employees join profile on employees_id=employees.Id join projects on profile_id=profile.id join tasks on projects_id=projects.id join assignedTo on tasks_id=tasks.id join skills on assignedTo_id=assignedTo.id join secondary on skills_id =skills.id where  (secondary.value='marmelade' or skills."primary"='marmelade') and exists( select * from  experience join domains on experience_id=experience.id  where experience.skills_id=skills.id  and domains.value='DevOps')

Please give me the total color of projects for employees.
